tagline: Independent building inspections for buyers, sellers, and developers across Newcastle and Sydney.

hero.headline: Building Inspections You Can Trust.
hero.subheadline: Everestics delivers clear, accurate, and actionable insights for homeowners, buyers, sellers, and investors — backed by technical expertise and personal service.

about.storyP1: Everestics started in Newcastle with a team of licensed inspectors and a belief that the industry needed more transparency. Too many buyers were settling on properties with hidden problems. Too many builds were passing inspection with defects that would cost thousands to fix later.
about.storyP2: We set out to change that. Today we serve clients across Newcastle, the Hunter Valley, and Sydney CBD — delivering the same rigorous, independent reports we started with, backed by the most current Australian Standards and the National Construction Code.

whyUs.title: Independent & Unbiased
whyUs.description: We work for you — not the builder, developer, or agent. Our reports are objective, thorough, and always in your interest.

whyUs.title: Fully Licensed Inspectors
whyUs.description: All inspectors hold current NSW licences and carry professional indemnity insurance. Qualified, accountable, professional.

whyUs.title: Fast Report Turnaround
whyUs.description: Receive your detailed inspection report within 24 hours of the inspection — formatted for easy reading and action.

whyUs.title: Detailed, Actionable Reports
whyUs.description: No jargon, no fluff. Clear findings, photographic evidence, and specific remediation recommendations.

whyUs.title: Full Compliance Coverage
whyUs.description: We check against current Australian Standards and the National Construction Code so you stay fully compliant.

whyUs.title: Local Knowledge, Personal Service
whyUs.description: Newcastle-based with Sydney CBD coverage. We know the local building landscape and regulations inside out.

services.title: Pre-Purchase Property Inspections
services.description: Before you sign anything, know exactly what you're getting. Our pre-purchase inspections identify structural issues, safety risks, hidden defects, and any evidence of non-compliant work — so you can negotiate from strength or walk away informed.
includes: Roof, subfloor and wall cavity inspection
Plain-language findings you can act on

services.title: Pre-Sale Inspections
services.tagline: Control your sale from the start.
services.description: Understand your property's condition before you list it. Identifying issues early lets you address them proactively, price accurately, and present buyers with confidence — removing uncertainty from both sides of the negotiation.
includes: Identification of defects and maintenance needs
Documentation to share with prospective buyers

services.title: Building Inspections
services.tagline: The full picture on any property.
services.description: A thorough examination of any residential or commercial building. We assess structural integrity, safety compliance, and maintenance requirements — giving you a clear, complete view of the property's condition.

services.title: New Build Stage Inspections
services.description: Don't rely solely on the builder's own sign-off. Our stage inspections provide independent assessment at key construction milestones — checking workmanship, structural elements, finishes, and compliance before the next phase begins.

services.title: Handover Inspections
services.tagline: Don't take possession of someone else's problem.
services.description: Your final opportunity to identify defects before occupancy. We document every issue thoroughly so your builder is legally required to correct them — protecting your investment from day one.
includes: Formal defect list for builder rectification

services.title: Termite & Pest Inspections
services.tagline: Don't let hidden invaders cost you thousands.
services.description: Termites and pests can cause significant structural damage that's invisible to the untrained eye. Our thorough pest inspections identify active infestations, past damage, and high-risk conditions — giving you the information you need before buying, selling, or maintaining a property.
includes: Full internal and external pest inspection

faqs.question: How quickly can I get an inspection?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule inspections within 48–72 hours of booking. For urgent requests, same-day or next-day appointments may be available.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We service Newcastle, the Hunter Valley, and Sydney CBD and surrounds. Contact us if you're unsure whether your property falls within our range.

faqs.question: How long does a report take?
faqs.answer: You'll receive your written report within 24 hours of the inspection, usually on the same day.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our inspectors are fully licensed building practitioners and carry professional indemnity and public liability insurance.
